name: Del Taco Restaurants, Inc.
description: Del Taco Restaurants, Inc. is a prominent American fast-food restaurant chain specializing in a unique fusion of Mexican and American cuisine. Founded in 1964 and headquartered in Lake Forest, California, the company operates and franchises nearly 600 locations across the United States. Del Taco is well-known for its made-to-order menu items, including tacos, burritos, and crinkle-cut fries, all prepared fresh in restaurant kitchens. By combining the convenience of a drive-thru with high-quality ingredients and affordable pricing, the brand maintains a strong presence in the competitive quick-service restaurant industry.
